title: Sultan
tmdbOverview: The ageing wrestler Sultan Ali Khan decides to try his luck on the mat again; to do this, he wants to represent his country at the Olympic Games, but first has to overcome personal issues.
synopsis: Sultan is a 2016 drama, action and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (IE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
